response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches a modified/stage version of '仮装狂騒曲' (Fancy Dress Party) by FAKE TYPE. used as a medley/performance by Hololive members. The provided JSON lyrics match some parts but have different verses; I am following the audio ground truth and on-screen text for the '放浪' vs 'ホロウ' pun. The video transitions from song to dialogue and battle at 02:34. I've ensured tight wrapping of timestamps for the fast-paced rap sections and maintained semantic continuity across the dialogue breaks.

subtitles.english: In a flash, it's out of control

subtitles.original: パンプキンの力が乱れてる！
subtitles.english: The pumpkins' power is going haywire!

subtitles.original: 恐れと不安が溶けていくんだ。歌の力、みんなの声の力で。
subtitles.english: Fear and anxiety are melting away. With the power of song, and everyone's voices.

subtitles.original: みんな乗ってるね！
subtitles.english: Everyone's getting into it!

subtitles.original: おかげでこっちもやる気いっぱいなのら！
subtitles.english: Thanks to that, I'm full of motivation too!

subtitles.original: さあ、行って。ホロウィッチ。心を苛むトリックに、
subtitles.english: Now, go, HoloWitches. To the trick that torments the heart...

subtitles.original: とびっきりのトリートを！
subtitles.english: give an extraordinary treat!

subtitles.original: みんな、応援ありがとう。思う存分、楽しんじゃうよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thanks for the support. I'm going to enjoy this to my heart's content!

subtitles.original: トリッキー！行っけー！
subtitles.english: Tricky! Go!

subtitles.original: わー！やられたー！
subtitles.english: Wah! They got me!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: イノセントリバイバー！
subtitles.english: Innocent Reviver!

subtitles.original: 信じてるからね。みんなの愛が、力をくれる。
subtitles.english: I believe in you. Everyone's love gives me strength.

subtitles.original: はー！おりゃー！
subtitles.english: Haa! Oryaa!

subtitles.original: フブにゃん！ラミィちゃん、ナイス！
subtitles.english: Fubu-nyan! Lamy-chan, nice!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、決めちゃうよ！はー！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's finish this! Haa!

subtitles.original: コン！
subtitles.english: Kon!

subtitles.original: ユニテリア ラミネーション！ スラッシュ トンプ コンプレッサー！
